notes: 3.11.20 — THE LUONG (SALARY PROFILE) + SO THEO DOI LUONG (Sep duyet mau MAU-THE-LUONG.html; FLAG_SALARY_PROFILE mac dinh TAT, bat: flag_salary_profile='1'): (1) Store salaryProfiles (sync + Master Data) — PHIEN BAN hieu luc theo THANG, KHONG ghi de: tao V moi tu dong dong effectiveTo ban truoc; ban da dung cho KY LUONG KHOA bi guard cam xoa; audit salary_profile_add/delete; quyen tao/sua = KTT (L1) + Admin. (2) Resolver salaryProfileAt(empId, ky) + salaryProfileBuildInp (R1: engine doc muc tu the). (3) UI: nut 💳 The luong trong ho so NV (theo dung mau da duyet: timeline version + ban hieu luc + BH tach NV 10,5%/DN 21,5% cty tra + form tao phien ban co LY DO bat buoc). (4) 📒 SO LUONG (toolbar Nhan su): bao cao quan tri READ-ONLY chi doc tu The luong (khong doc bang luong thang): KPI quy luong/binh quan/tang trong nam/ty le tang BQ; bieu do phan bo theo phong ban + so luot tang theo nam; danh sach den ky xet tang (>=10 thang) + HD sap het han (<=60 ngay); loc phong ban/chuc vu/NV/khoang luong + tim nhanh (den ky xet, lau chua tang >=18th, tang trong nam, NV moi 90 ngay, sap het HD); lich su dieu chinh day du (truoc→sau, +/-, %, nguoi, ly do); click ten → drill-down mo The luong.
